response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong polyglot experience, GIS background (GISCollective, Green Map), and some low-latency systems work in D at Sociomantic. However, the role specifically requires modern C++ (or Rust) as primary, and the resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure from 2014-2015 at National Instruments with no recent commercial C++/Rust work. Geospatial domain fit is genuine, but the core language requirement is a significant gap.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS domain experience via GISCollective and Green Map
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience at Sociomantic (millions req/sec, async I/O, fibers)
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, testability, Linux fluency
concerns: No recent modern C++ or Rust experience; last C/C++ role was 2014-2015
Recent work is predominantly TypeScript/Node.js, not systems-level
No demonstrated experience with routing tile pipelines or navigation guidance QA
